title: Documentation
intro: Everything you need to adopt `contract-kit` from scratch: first install, contract modeling, generation flow, and release safety checks.
audienceItems: Frontend + backend teams that want one typed API source of truth.
Tech leads who need predictable release checks for API compatibility.
Developers integrating Angular clients with backend handlers without manual type drift.

pathSteps.title: Get running in minutes
pathSteps.description: Install the package, scaffold a project, and execute your first generation/check cycle.

pathSteps.title: Understand command behavior
pathSteps.description: Learn what each CLI command does, when to run it, and what output to expect.

pathSteps.title: Model your API contracts
pathSteps.description: Define endpoint schemas correctly so generation and compatibility checks stay deterministic.

packages.name: @fr4n0m/contract-kit
packages.role: Main CLI package for init/generate/check/validate/mock workflows.
packages.whenUse: Use directly in app repos or CI pipelines.

packages.name: @fr4n0m/core
packages.role: Contract parser + deterministic summary/model generation core.
packages.whenUse: Use when building custom tooling around contract processing.

packages.name: @fr4n0m/contract-diff
packages.role: Reusable compatibility diff engine between generated summaries.
packages.whenUse: Use in release automation, custom guards, and reporting integrations.

packages.name: @fr4n0m/plugin-nestjs + @fr4n0m/validator-zod
packages.role: Backend scaffolding and runtime schema validation outputs.
packages.whenUse: Use when wiring generated contracts into NestJS and validation middleware.

helpText: Need support or want to report an issue? Use GitHub issues in the repository.
